title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
instructions: 1. Cook the spaghetti. 2. Fry the pancetta. 3. Beat the eggs and mix with cheese. 4. Combine everything and serve.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.
instructions: 1. Marinate the chicken. 2. Grill the chicken. 3. Cook the sauce. 4. Combine chicken and sauce, then serve.
